hero.title: Fair, Transparent, and Tailored to Your Needs
hero.p1: At VACEI, we don't believe in one-size-fits-all pricing. Every business is unique, and your pricing should reflect the actual work involved.
hero.p2: We provide tailored quotes based on scope, complexity, and requirements—with no hidden costs and no obligation to proceed.

factors.title: How Pricing is Determined
factors.subtitle: Pricing at VACEI is based on a structured assessment of several factors. These factors allow us to define scope clearly and avoid surprises later.
factors.tipBody: Click on any factor card above to explore more details

items.title: Scope of Work
items.shortDesc: The most important factor in pricing is scope.
items.highlight: Clear scope allows pricing to be defined accurately and predictably.

items.title: Business Size & Structure
items.shortDesc: Pricing takes into account the size and structure of the business.
items.highlight: More complex structures typically require additional coordination and oversight.

items.title: Volume & Activity Levels
items.shortDesc: For operational services, pricing is influenced by activity levels.
items.highlight: Higher volumes or more frequent reporting increase the level of work required.

items.title: Regulatory & Compliance
items.shortDesc: Some services are subject to higher regulatory requirements.
items.highlight: These factors affect the level of documentation, review, and oversight involved.

items.title: Risk & Responsibility
items.shortDesc: Professional responsibility and risk are considered when pricing services.
details: Exposure to regulatory or professional risk
items.highlight: Higher-risk engagements require additional controls and review.

items.title: Duration & Timing
items.shortDesc: Pricing also considers timing and engagement length.
items.highlight: Time-sensitive or long-duration engagements may require different pricing structures.

overview.title: Explore Our Service Categories
overview.subtitle: Each service is priced based on your specific requirements. Browse our categories to understand typical pricing models.

contactCard.title: Need a custom quote?
contactCard.description: Get a tailored proposal based on your exact requirements.

quoteProcess.title: How Quotes Work
quoteProcess.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from initial discussion to confirmed pricing.

steps.title: Initial Discussion
steps.description: Share your requirements and business context with our team.

steps.title: Scope Assessment
steps.description: We review your needs and assess the scope, complexity, and requirements.

steps.title: Clear Quote Provided
steps.description: Receive a detailed quote outlining services, scope, pricing structure, and assumptions.

steps.title: Review & Confirm
steps.description: Review the proposal at your own pace. No pressure, no obligation to proceed.

quoteProcess.everyBody: Once initial information is reviewed, VACEI provides a clear quote that ensures complete transparency and understanding before any work begins.
quoteProcess.scopeBody: If scope changes during an engagement, pricing is discussed and agreed before any additional work is carried out. We believe in complete transparency at every stage.

whatToExpect.title: What to Expect
whatToExpect.subtitle: When working with VACEI, our goal is to ensure pricing reflects the work required and remains predictable throughout the engagement.

items.title: Clear Pricing Discussions Upfront
items.description: We discuss pricing openly from the start, ensuring you understand how costs are determined.

items.title: No Hidden Fees
items.description: All costs are outlined clearly in your quote. What you see is what you get.

items.title: No Unexpected Charges
items.description: You won't receive surprise invoices. Any changes to scope are discussed and agreed in advance.

items.title: Transparent Communication
items.description: If requirements change during the engagement, we communicate openly and adjust pricing accordingly.

whatToExpect.bottomBody: Our approach ensures you only pay for the services you need, with complete clarity on what's included and how costs are calculated. No surprises, no hidden agendas—just honest, professional service.

cta.title: Ready to Discuss Pricing?
cta.body: If you'd like to understand how pricing applies to your specific situation, you can request a quote or discuss your requirements with our team.
